archetype: Tactical / Field Ops (Variant of Performance Pro & Swiss Brutalist)

typography.font_install_instructions: Add Google Fonts imports for Chivo and JetBrains Mono.

rules.headings: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter). Avoid default bold; use varying weights. Max size text-6xl for Hero.
rules.body: Use JetBrains Mono for all data points, coordinates, logs, and body text to enforce the terminal/navigation instrument feel.
rules.labels: Overlines and labels MUST be uppercase, tiny, and wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

spacing_and_layout.general: Mobile-first responsive. Use generous spacing (p-8, p-12) for landing page. Dense, strict grid hierarchy for dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: Control Room Grid. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Gap-4. Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_surfaces: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Cardless or 1px solid borders (border-zinc-800). Flat surfaces. No glassmorphism in dashboard to prevent visual refraction of data.

components.general: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout. Use Shadcn UI for complex interactive logic.
components.customization: Override Shadcn default radiuses to rounded-none. Use JetBrains Mono in input fields and tables.
components.map: Leaflet with OpenStreetMap. IMPORTANT: Use a dark tile layer (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter) if available. Draw trail history with neon amber polyline. Geofences with translucent red/amber fills.
components.buttons: Square edges, high contrast. Only use Primary (Amber) for main CTAs. Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:bg-amber-600 hover:text-black).

motion_and_interactions.general: Minimalist animations. Micro-interactions for feedback (e.g., status pinging).
motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicitly set text color on hover. Focus states must have higher contrast.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Provide sufficient contrast for all text.

media.hero_image_description: Lone adventurer shining a flashlight in a dark forest at night - evokes field ops and exploration. Use bg-black/40 overlay.
media.radar_image_description: Gigantic metal satellite dish structure - evokes device pairing and signals.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React (already installed) for consistent, technical line-art icons. Use size 16 or 20 for data rows.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='start-tracking-btn', data-testid='device-status').

pages.landing: Hero section with large Chivo heading, hero_image with max bg-black/50 overlay. 'Editorial Ribbon' or tech specs marquee. CTAs to Dashboard and Tracker Web App.
pages.dashboard: Tactical dark UI. Main area: Leaflet map. Side panel: List of active devices, live speed/altitude/battery metrics, geofence alerts log. Polyline for trails.
pages.device_management: Grid/Table of devices. Form to pair new device using 6-char code. Status indicators (Green for online, Red for offline).
pages.tracker_mobile: Mobile-first view for the old phone. Big 'Broadcasting...' status card. Input for 6-char code. Start/Stop toggle button. Uses Geolocation API.
pages.geofence_manager: Map interface to drop center points and drag radius. Sidebar list of geofences with toggle switches for alerts.
